description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages validate, build, test, release, and deploy, using the eu.gcr.io/third-rock/bronto-crane:1.1.0 Docker image, a moby/buildkit service (alias buildkitd) and a before_script that creates a Docker config with CI_REGISTRY and eu.gcr.io credentials. In the build stage define three jobs: build runs buildctl with --frontend dockerfile.v0, DOCKERFILE=Dockerfile and OUTPUT_IMAGES=$CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE,$CONTAINER_CACHE_IMAGE; build_singularity_builder runs the same buildctl command but with DOCKERFILE=Dockerfile_singularity and OUTPUT_IMAGES=$SINGULARITY_BUILDER_IMAGE; tag runs the same command with DOCKERFILE=Dockerfile and OUTPUT_IMAGES=$CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE,$CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE, all gated by rules for default branch, merge requests, tags or fixes branches. In the validate stage add check_changelog using an alpine image that echoes a failure message and exits if CHANGES.* files are not modified, always running. In the test stage add lint (pip3 install -r requirements_dev.txt then pylint classifier tests), mypy (pip3 install -r requirements_dev.txt then bin/mypy.sh classifier $MYPY_FAIL_OVER), unittest (pip3 install -r requirements_dev.txt then pytest) and test_pages (pip3 install -r requirements_dev.txt, make -C docs html, copy output to test_pages) jobs, all using $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and publishing artifacts for test_pages. In the release stage add latest (buildctl with Dockerfile and OUTPUT_IMAGES=$CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE), pages (make docs html, copy to public and publish as GitLab Pages artifact), pypi (run sh bin/release-to-pypi.sh RELEASE $PYPI_USERNAME $PYPI_PASSWORD), singularity (bash /app/create-singularity.sh $CI_COMMIT_TAG) and release (pip install dev requirements then bin/auto-release.sh) jobs, each triggered by tag or fixes‑branch rules as specified, and using the appropriate container images.
